meta.vehicleClass: Passenger cars, taxis and light goods vehicles
meta.baseRateSource: OneMotoring ERP Rates PDF, with effect from 23 Mar 2026
meta.latestAdjustmentSource: LTA news release, Revised ERP Rates from 2 June 2026, published 25 May 2026
meta.gantrySource: data.gov.sg LTA Gantry (GEOJSON), last updated 06 Jun 2024
notes: Weekday rates are modelled. Saturdays and Sundays are treated as zero ERP in this app.
Public holidays and eve-of-public-holiday early cut-offs are not modelled in this first version.
Where LTA defines a set of gantries, the app charges at most once for the set.
Route matching uses proximity to the official gantry line geometry and should be treated as an estimate.
